model.description: faster-whisper model name (e.g. tiny, base, small, medium, large-v3, large-v3-turbo)

language.description: ISO 639-1 language code, or 'auto' for autodetect

skip_if_exists.description: Skip if a sidecar .srt already exists for this file

compute_type.description: CTranslate2 compute type. 'auto' picks float16 on GPU, int8 on CPU.
